The strategy centers on G:\AI\AI-canonical as a git-backed markdown repository serving as the single source of truth, with multiple interfaces (Claude Code, claude-mem, Telegram, Cursor) consuming from it. The architecture separates concerns: canonical corpus stores distilled knowledge, MCP facades provide search/remember APIs, SQLite FTS5 enables retrieval, and a bridge runtime supports Telegram-based interactions. The cloud-vs-local policy (policies/cloud-vs-local.md) ensures sensitive content stays local while shareable patterns sync to private GitHub. Human oversight happens via git diff review and Telegram approval before commits. The strategy inventories existing assets (16 Kiro skills, 18 Claude skills, 26 commands, 15 agents, existing AIMemory corpus) and defines migration paths. Phase 0-2 are complete: repository established, gitignore configured, policies documented, general content migrated (commit 850a79d).
